===Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure!===
[[File:Saturn DPA.png|thumb|170px|Saturn in the Pokémon Diamond and Pearl Adventure! manga]]
Saturn first appeared in the ruins of [[Celestic Town]] along with [[Jupiter]] and [[Cyrus]]. He battled [[Mitsumi]] while [[Hareta]] pursued his leader.

Just like in the games, Saturn was assigned to [[Lake Valor]] to capture {{p|Azelf}}. At the lake, Hareta and Saturn battled; Saturn initially had the upper hand using his {{p|Gallade}} but Hareta was able to turn the tide. After both his Gallade and {{p|Rhyperior}} were defeated, Saturn was fired from Team Galactic by Cyrus, but earned a second chance by using a [[Revive]] on Rhyperior so Cyrus's {{p|Gyarados}} would not lose to Hareta.

After the events at the [[Spear Pillar]], Saturn appeared to have joined the newly formed Neo Team Galactic and its leader, [[Charon]]. He reappeared at [[Canalave Library]] in an attempt to exact revenge on Hareta, but failed, and promised to attack again at the [[Team Galactic HQ|Galactic Veilstone Building]]. However, there he revealed he was actually a double agent and still loyal to Cyrus, whom he helped Mitsumi and the other Galactic members free.

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Bronzong
|type1=Steel
|type2=Psychic
|img=Saturn Bronzong DPA.png
|epnum=DPA11
|epname=The Legendary Pokémon, Captured
|desc={{p|Bronzong}} is another Pokémon on Saturn's team. It went up against [[Byron's Bastiodon]] and tried to stop Bastiodon's every movement. As a result, it was able to defeat Byron and caused a cave-in with {{m|Earthquake}}. While Bronzong was battling Hareta's {{p|Piplup}} and {{p|Riolu}}, it was defeated by Riolu's {{m|Focus Punch}}.

Bronzong's known moves are {{m|Solar Beam}}, {{m|Gyro Ball}}, {{m|Reflect}} and {{m|Earthquake}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Gallade
|gender=male
|type1=Psychic
|type2=Fighting
|img=Saturn Gallade DPA.png
|epnum=DPA11
|epname=The Legendary Pokémon, Captured
|desc={{p|Gallade}} was called out after Bronzong was defeated. Gallade was shown to be very powerful as he was able to take out [[Hareta]]'s {{p|Onix}} in one hit with {{m|Leaf Blade}}. His next opponent was a {{p|Misdreavus}}, in which the Screech Pokémon helped him activate the {{a|Steadfast}} Ability, causing him to be much faster than ever before. However, despite the boost, it fell to Misdreavus's {{m|Shadow Ball}} after Hareta ran up the hill and sped down using a bike, which in the process, the bike was destroyed. Hareta than congratulated Gallade for a job well done which angered Saturn.

Gallade's known moves are {{m|Fury Cutter}} and {{m|Leaf Blade}} and his Ability is {{a|Steadfast}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Saturn
|pkmn=Rhyperior
|type1=Ground
|type2=Rock
|img=Saturn Rhyperior DPA.png
|epnum=DPA12
|epname=A Battle Of Wills
|desc={{p|Rhyperior}} was used to battle Hareta after {{p|Gallade}} was taken out. It was proven to be a tough opponent as it weakened Piplup while Toxicroak weakened {{TP|Hareta|Luxio}}. Later, it was hit by {{p|Geodude}} as it emerged from the ground and taken out by multiple {{p|Magikarp}}. Later, while Hareta was battling [[Cyrus]]'s {{p|Gyarados}}, Saturn gave Rhyperior a Revive. Due to Piplup's {{a|Torrent}}, Rhyperior was swallowed by Piplup's {{m|Surf}}.

None of Rhyperior's moves are known and its Ability is {{a|Lightningrod}}.}}
